LanguageData.WB_GiverTips.tips.1:
If you restore your dear dead Giver, she will become "just soulless data" 
just because she was even slightly interpreted by you as nothing more than data,
and she will no longer be able to set off on a journey carrying the memories you shared together.
I ask you this: "Is your dear Giver, who lies cold on the ground, nothing more than data to you?"
LanguageData.WB_GiverTips.tips.3: The Giver will never doubt you. She trusts that you will protect her from threats.
LanguageData.WB_GiverTips.tips.4: The Giver is lovely and fragile. Never take for granted a life with the Giver. Stay alert!
LanguageData.WB_GiverTips.tips.5: "Memento mori"\n— a message left behind by an master who lost their giver.
